caption: A person with a white wristband on their left arm is crafting a greeting card on a white gridded cutting mat. The person uses both hands to position a decorative piece of patterned green and yellow paper onto a brown card base. A white circular label is attached to the card, featuring the text "Wishing your BIRTHDAY is filled with all the best things". Around the workspace are various crafting tools, including a clear tape dispenser, a red stamp, and a black ink pad. In the sequence, the person's hands adjust the placement of the patterned paper, moving it slightly to align it with the brown card base. The background remains a consistent white table surface with a white textured paper sheet nearby. A small logo reading "The Stamping" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
